title: Ny'yosin bush
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''ny'yosin bush''' was a plant native to [[Cularin/Legends|Cularin]]. Black marketerer [[Quaad Endac]] wore this plant so he could be identified.

{{Flora-stub}}
